heading: Why Endfield Planner?
description: Stop guessing. Start optimizing. Our calculator handles the complex math so you can focus on building.

items.title: Recipe Tree Viewer
items.description: See the full production chain for any item — from raw seeds and ores to final products — displayed as an interactive tree.

items.title: Building Calculator
items.description: Know exactly how many Greenhouses, Smelters, Grinders, Workshops, Mixers, Assemblers, and Labs you need.

items.title: Connection Schema
items.description: Get a visual flow diagram showing how buildings should be connected for perfectly balanced production lines.

items.title: Max Efficiency
items.description: Every calculation targets 100% uptime — no idle machines, no bottlenecks. Ratios keep every belt saturated.

items.title: 60+ Recipes
items.description: Complete database covering all crafting chains: batteries, capsules, components, powders, solutions, and more.

items.title: Zero Setup
items.description: Works right in your browser. No downloads, no accounts, no ads. Just pick an item and get your answer.
